positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a howling forest wolf head, rendered in a sophisticated geometric neo-traditional tattoo style. The wolf's outline should be strong and stylized, composed of clean black lines and negative space, creating a dynamic, symmetrical cresting effect. Incorporate elements of lunar cycles, stylized constellations, and branching sacred geometry elements surrounding the head. The composition must be centralized and circular, designed to look excellent as a single, high-contrast chest print on apparel. Color palette should be monochromatic black and white (or deeply saturated indigo on a cream background), emphasizing graphic depth and silhouette. High contrast, etched linework, clean vector look, award-winning tattoo flash art, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, deformed, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor contrast, gradient, photo-realistic, 3d render, messy, grainy
